anti_patterns.title: Platform chrome presented as maker evidence
anti_patterns.do_not: Claim platform funding rails, headers, or badges as visual proof authored by the maker.

anti_patterns.title: Acid-lime-on-black used as the whole story
anti_patterns.do_not: Use a loud acid-lime palette as a substitute for product mechanism, testing, and maker readiness.

anti_patterns.title: AI-purple gradient replaces a product story
anti_patterns.do_not: Use a familiar purple or pink gradient as a shortcut for a distinctive product narrative.
